description: Implement the Warden AI alert escalation system. Alert level (0-5) increases based on player actions (combat, hacking, destroying cameras) and drives enemy spawn rates and types, creating a dynamic difficulty clock.
acceptance_criteria: A global alert level integer (0-5) persists throughout the run, starting at 0.
Combat noise increases alert by 1 per combat encounter. Hacking increases by 1 per hack. Destroying a camera increases by 1.
At alert levels 0-1, only passive maintenance bots and dormant turrets are present.
At alert levels 2-3, active security patrols spawn in unexplored rooms and some doors auto-lock.
At alert levels 4-5, hunter-killer enemies spawn, and the Warden can depower rooms the player is approaching.
The current alert level is displayed in the HUD as a meter (e.g., 5 pips or a bar).
Alert level never decreases during a run — it is a one-way escalation.
notes: Spec: 'The Warden cannot be permanently defeated — only managed. Stealth runs keep alert low. Combat runs must deal with escalating response. This creates a natural timer.' MVP uses 3 levels (spec says 3 for MVP), expandable to 5.
